summary: Consolidate the PSA frontend design system and repair high-impact readability, layering, and dashboard layout drift.

notes: No database schema or RPC changes are included in this release.
Function grant assertions are not required by this frontend-only release.
Added PRODUCT.md and expanded DESIGN.md so PSA has an explicit product register and executable frontend design rules.
Introduced semantic z-index tokens for dropdown, sticky, popover, modal, toast, and tooltip layers.
Added shared feedback primitives for loading skeletons, empty states, error states, and refresh indicators.
Updated department color chips to keep text readable in both light and dark themes.
Tokenized segmented controls and aligned popovers, dialogs, sheets, selects, and tooltips with the shared layer scale.
Improved dashboard analysis chart readability, fixed distribution label alignment, and reduced dark-mode contrast drift.
Gave approval review tables more room for weekly timesheets while keeping OT lower priority.
Brought organization and approval configuration surfaces closer to the shared configuration-page design language.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.24 and production VITE variables.
Run sidebar menu geometry Playwright smoke.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.24.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.24.
known_warnings: Vite may still warn that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
The sidebar settings layering Playwright smoke depends on a reachable E2E_BASE_URL; local attempts can time out before assertions if the configured server is unavailable.
